assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: local service businesses in Suriname that want a consistent way to invite genuine reviews

creative_strategy.audience_insight: A genuine review invitation is easier to remember when it is part of the service-completion routine.
creative_strategy.message_angle: The workflow connects a completed transaction with a respectful follow-up invitation.
creative_strategy.hook: The best time to ask should not be an afterthought.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A familiar service-completion scene will make review operations feel practical rather than promotional.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a neatly completed service receipt beside an elegant blank review-invitation card
visual_direction.action: a subtle lime line connects service completion to the invitation card without showing a rating
visual_direction.environment: a real local service counter with tactile paper, payment tray, and no visible brand
visual_direction.composition: top-down close crop, receipt lower-left, invitation card center-right, copy space above
visual_direction.lighting: soft natural counter light with restrained lime connection detail
visual_direction.style: authentic editorial still life with premium paper texture and operational clarity

copy.overlay_headline: The best time to ask should not be an afterthought.
copy.overlay_support: Review link + QR prompt + follow-up copy
copy.caption: A genuine review invitation works best as a consistent part of follow-up. Zenta creates the link, QR prompt, and message copy for that flow.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a neatly completed service receipt beside an elegant blank review-invitation card. Show a subtle lime line connects service completion to the invitation card without showing a rating. Set the scene in a real local service counter with tactile paper, payment tray, and no visible brand. Composition: top-down close crop, receipt lower-left, invitation card center-right, copy space above. Lighting: soft natural counter light with restrained lime connection detail. Visual style: authentic editorial still life with premium paper texture and operational clarity. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'The workflow connects a completed transaction with a respectful follow-up invitation.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'The best time to ask should not be an afterthought.', support line 'Review link + QR prompt + follow-up copy', and CTA 'Build your review flow' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid star ratings, positive-review pressure, customer names, functional QR codes or reward imagery, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
star ratings, positive-review pressure, customer names, functional QR codes or reward imagery

accessibility.alt_text: A completed service receipt is connected to a blank review invitation card.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Do not fabricate reviews, ratings, testimonials, customer identities, or incentives.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
